bridge_equation_v42.plasticity_term: B_plastic_v42 = mix(B_plastic_v41, L_sys_field_crystal, 1 - P_sys_field_crystal, D_feature_v36, 1 - G_brain_v36)
bridge_equation_v42.structure_term: B_struct_v42 = mix(B_struct_v41, S_sys_field_crystal, R_sys_field_crystal, 1 - P_sys_field_crystal, D_structure_v36)
bridge_equation_v42.readiness_term: R_train_v42 = mix(R_train_v41, B_plastic_v42, B_struct_v42, R_sys_field_crystal, D_align_v36, 1 - P_sys_field_crystal)

project_readout.summary: training bridge v42 checks whether systemic low-risk field crystallization begins to reduce rule-layer risk in a more persistent field-like way.
project_readout.next_question: next verify whether this crystallized low-risk field still survives after it is folded into the next closed-form core.
